description: Generate a zk-TLS attestation of an HTTPS session via TLSNotary
requires: native module (cd native && npm run build)

request.maxSentData: number (optional, default 4096) — max bytes to send
request.maxRecvData: number (optional, default 16384) — max bytes to receive
request.revealRanges: array (optional) — [{ start: number, end: number }] byte ranges of response to reveal

output.sentLen: number — bytes sent in the TLS session
output.recvLen: number — bytes received in the TLS session

error_output.error: string — 'native binding required — build native/ with: cd native && npm run build'
